microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized, self-serve system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 delivery of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-serve scheduling capabilities that **reduced operational toil by 30%** and shifted execution from a request-based model to a scalable, self-service data-and-ops culture.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivered a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model adopted across the org.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating Security, IT, and engineering stakeholders across distributed teams.

Built an AI agent to automate drill-planning workflows, cutting **planning cycle time by 39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% — mirroring the self-serve, time-to-insight efficiency goals central to Figma's Data Assistant program.

Owned program-level success metrics and governance across 14 partner integrations, tracking dependency health, access controls, and exec-facing KPIs to ensure end-to-end **program delivery** on schedule and within scope.
microsoft_2023: Drove **adoption of AI-powered, self-serve workflows** by leading demos and enablement sessions across 14 Azure teams, shifting behavior from manual request-based processes and saving **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating findings into prioritized requirements for DS and engineering stakeholders.

Improved data self-serve coverage by enforcing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** interface, reducing lookup time by 83% and expanding trustworthy, on-demand data access across the org.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by aligning 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework — driving cross-functional program delivery at scale across a deeply distributed org.

Built the program roadmap to eliminate manual toil in region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of per-region manual effort** and defining the critical automation paths that became the execution backbone.

Engineered a **Power BI analytics dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and measure time-to-insight improvements over successive planning cycles.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot by owning the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating delivery across IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across a cross-functional team.

Drove stakeholder alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoff toil between teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM process that shifted the team from ad-hoc requests to a structured, self-serve ops model.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-informed, digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website and Google profile based on performance analytics.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks through structured financial modeling shared with senior stakeholders.

tailoring_notes: 'self-serve' and 'request-based to self-serve' framing (JD's core cultural shift) woven into microsoft_ft bullet#2, microsoft_2023 bullet#1, and pro_painters bullet#1
'time-to-insight' (JD's explicit success metric) surfaced in microsoft_2022 bullet#3 and microsoft_ft bullet#5 to mirror program-level KPI language
'semantic search' (JD references semantic layers and AI-powered query interfaces) placed in microsoft_2023 bullet#3 to demonstrate hands-on familiarity with the data stack
'governance,' 'access controls,' and 'LLM data access' language (JD's security work stream) reflected in microsoft_ft bullet#4 and skills section
'adoption' and 'change management / enablement' (JD explicitly calls out behavior change, not just shipping tools) anchored in microsoft_2023 bullet#1 and pro_painters bullet#1
